The Landlord Relationship Hub Team PSI Assets Real Estate LLC
Professional Summary

Bridging the gap between operations, compliance, and sales excellence.

I am a results-driven Real Estate Operations Leader with extensive experience managing high-volume listings, resale transactions, and centralized hubs in Abu Dhabi.

My expertise lies in ensuring full ADGM and ADREC compliance while maintaining audit-ready operations and minimizing risk. I have a proven track record of building scalable workflows, managing team performance through rigorous KPIs, and coordinating cross-functionally between Marketing, Legal, and Finance to ensure smooth transaction closures and service excellence.

👥
Team ScalingGrew listing team from 7 to 60+ members while maintaining quality.
✅
Risk ManagementMaintained 100% ADGM/ADREC compliance throughout tenure.
📈
High VolumeManaged teams generating 10–50 listings daily at peak.
💼
Sales AcumenPersonally closed 30+ resale deals and 5 leasing transactions.
Career Progression

Growth at PSI Assets Real Estate

A journey of continuous advancement, taking on increasing responsibilities and driving operational excellence.

July 2025 – Dec 2025
Listing Manager (Hub Head)
Directed full operational oversight of the Listing Hub, building and scaling the centralized Landlord Relationship Hub (LRO).
Senior liaison between Ops, Legal & Finance100% ADGM/ADREC compliance
Jan 2025 – June 2025
Listing Supervisor
Supervised multiple listing teams across branches, managing daily workload distribution and performance tracking.
Gap analysis supportStreamlined reporting
June 2023 – Dec 2024
Listing Team Leader
Led and coached listings team, growing it from 7 to 60 people while handling complex escalations. Team monthly: 10-20 resale, 20-50 leasing.
Team growth 7→60High-volume operations
Aug 2022 – May 2023
Listing Coordinator
Managed CRM accuracy, data entry, and coordination for mortgage and cash transactions. Personally closed 30+ resale deals.
30+ personal dealsCRM administration
Flagship Project

Landlord Relationship Hub (LRO)

Conceptualized, architected, and scaled entirely from the ground up — a centralized operational model for landlord engagement across Abu Dhabi's secondary real estate market.

I designed and built the foundational framework of this hub — including its mission, vision, strategic objectives, organizational structure, operational workflows, and compliance framework. What started as a concept became a fully operational division within PSI Assets.
